channel.title: secure communication on Lily Wasko
channel.description: Recent content in secure communication on Lily Wasko

item.title: Secure Communication Using Superdense Coding of the GHZ 5 State
item.description: View this project’s code on GitHub :) Background Quantum Computing Qubits The most basic unit of information in classical computing is the bit. It stores a value either of 0 or 1, which represent the presense or absense of electrons in a transistor. In quantum computing, however, the most basic unit of information is the qubit. A qubit, like a bit, can store either 0 or 1, but it also has the unique ability to store a value that is both 0 and 1: a superposition state.
